lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਚੈ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਕੋ ਆਧਾਰ ॥੨॥੭੮॥੧੦੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daas daras prabh jaachai man tan ko aadhaar |2|78|101|
lines.english: Slave Nanak asks for the Blessed Vision of God. It is the Support of his mind and body. ||2||78||101||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: mailaa har ke naam bin jeeo |
lines.english: Without the Name of the Lord, the soul is polluted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ਬਿਖੈ ਠਗਉਰੀ ਪੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin prabh saachai aap bhulaaeaa bikhai tthgauree peeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Lord God has Himself administered the intoxicating drug of corruption, and led the mortal astray. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮਤੌ ਬਹੁ ਭਾਂਤੀ ਥਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਕਤਹੂ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam bhramatau bahu bhaantee thit nahee katahoo paaee |
lines.english: Wandering through millions of incarnations in countless ways, he does not find stability anywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਮ੍ਰਿਥ ਦਾਤੇ ਤੁਮ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: raakh lehu prabh samrith daate tum prabh agam apaar |
lines.english: Please save me, O All-powerful Lord God, O Great Giver; O God, You are Inaccessible and Infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਨ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur sehaj na bhettiaa saakat aavai jaaee |1|
lines.english: The faithless cynic does not intuitively meet with the Perfect True Guru; he continues coming and going in reincarnation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੀ ਸਰਣਾਈ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਉਤਰਿਓ ਪਾਰ ॥੨॥੭੯॥੧੦੨॥
lines.translit: naanak daas teree saranaaee bhavajal utario paar |2|79|102|
lines.english: Slave Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary, to cross over the terrible world-ocean, and reach the other shore. ||2||79||102||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਮਣ ਕਉ ਰਾਮ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਬਾਦ ॥
lines.translit: raman kau raam ke gun baad |
lines.english: To chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord is Sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੁ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਸੁਆਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang dhiaaeeai paramesar amrit jaa ke suaad |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, meditate on the Transcendent Lord God; The taste of His essence is Ambrosial Nectar. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਤ ਏਕੁ ਅਚੁਤ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਦ ॥
lines.translit: simarat ek achut abinaasee binase maaeaa maad |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the One Unmoving, Eternal, Unchanging Lord God, the intoxication of Maya wears off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਅਨਦ ਅਨਹਦ ਧੁਨਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਭਏ ਬਿਖਾਦ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sehaj anad anahad dhun baanee bahur na bhe bikhaad |1|
lines.english: One who is blessed with intuitive peace and poise, and the vibrations of the Unstruck Celestial Bani, never suffers again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਨਕਾਦਿਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਦਿਕ ਗਾਵਤ ਗਾਵਤ ਸੁਕ ਪ੍ਰਹਿਲਾਦ ॥
lines.translit: sanakaadik brahamaadik gaavat gaavat suk prahilaad |
lines.english: Even Brahma and his sons sing God's Praises; Sukdayv and Prahlaad sing His Praises as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੀਵਤ ਅਮਿਉ ਮਨੋਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਸਮਾਦ ॥੨॥੮੦॥੧੦੩॥
lines.translit: peevat amiau manohar har ras jap naanak har bisamaad |2|80|103|
lines.english: Drinking in the fascinating Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's sublime essence, Nanak meditates on the Amazing Lord. ||2||80||103||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਨੑੇ ਪਾਪ ਕੇ ਬਹੁ ਕੋਟ ॥
lines.translit: keenae paap ke bahu kott |
lines.english: He commits many millions of sins.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਨੀ ਥਕਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਤਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਛੋਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dinas rainee thakat naahee kateh naahee chhott |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Day and night, he does not get tired of them, and he never finds release. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਘਰਿ ਗਈਆਂ ਖਿਨਹਿ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਜਮਹਿ ਗ੍ਰਾਸੇ ਝੋਟ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aughar geean khineh bheetar jameh graase jhott |1|
lines.english: In an instant, he is exposed. The Messenger of Death seizes him by his hair. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਜਰ ਬਿਖ ਬਿਆਧੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਉਠਾਈ ਪੋਟ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa bajar bikh biaadhee sir utthaaee pott |
lines.english: He carries on his head a terrible, heavy load of sin and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਫੇਟ ॥੨॥੮੧॥੧੦੪॥
lines.translit: bhaj saadhasang gobind naanak kachh na laagai fett |2|81|104|
lines.english: Vibrating and meditating on the Lord of the Universe in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, O Nanak, you shall never be struck or harmed at all. ||2||81||104||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਸੁ ਪਰੇਤ ਉਸਟ ਗਰਧਭ ਅਨਿਕ ਜੋਨੀ ਲੇਟ ॥
lines.translit: pas paret usatt garadhabh anik jonee lett |
lines.english: He is consigned to countless forms of reincarnation, into beasts, ghosts, camels and donkeys.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨ ਸ੍ਰਵਨ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਹੁਟਿਓ ਸਾਸੁ ਗਇਓ ਤਤ ਘਾਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nain sravan sareer sabh huttio saas geo tat ghaatt |1| rahaau |
lines.english: His eyes, ears and body are totally exhausted; he shall lose his breath in an instant. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੇ ਖਾਵਹਿ ਬਿਸੂ ਕੇ ਗਟਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: andhe khaaveh bisoo ke gattaak |
lines.english: He is so blind! He is eating loads of poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਰਞਾਣਿ ਉਦਰੁ ਲੇ ਪੋਖਹਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਗਈਆ ਹਾਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: anaath rayaan udar le pokheh maaeaa geea haatt |
lines.english: Making the poor suffer, he fills his belly, but the wealth of Maya shall not go with him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਕਰਤ ਕਰਤ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਹਿ ਕਬਹੁ ਨ ਸਾਕਹਿ ਛਾਂਟਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kilabikh karat karat pachhutaaveh kabahu na saakeh chhaantt |1|
lines.english: Committing sinful mistakes again and again, he regrets and repents, but he can never give them up. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ਜਮਦੂਤੀ ਆਇ ਸੰਘਾਰਿਓ ਦੇਵਹਿ ਮੂੰਡ ਉਪਰਿ ਮਟਾਕ ॥
lines.translit: nindak jamadootee aae sanghaario deveh moondd upar mattaak |
lines.english: The Messenger of Death comes to slaughter the slanderer; he beats him on his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਨ ਕਟਾਰੀ ਆਪਸ ਕਉ ਲਾਈ ਮਨੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਕੀਨੋ ਫਾਟ ॥੨॥੮੨॥੧੦੫॥
lines.translit: naanak aapan kattaaree aapas kau laaee man apanaa keeno faatt |2|82|105|
lines.english: O Nanak, he cuts himself with his own dagger, and damages his own mind. ||2||82||105||

lines.gurmukhi: ਟੂਟੀ ਨਿੰਦਕ ਕੀ ਅਧ ਬੀਚ ॥
lines.translit: ttoottee nindak kee adh beech |
lines.english: The slanderer is destroyed in mid-stream.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਾ ਰਾਖਾ ਆਪਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਬੇਮੁਖ ਕਉ ਆਇ ਪਹੂਚੀ ਮੀਚ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan kaa raakhaa aap suaamee bemukh kau aae pahoochee meech |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Our Lord and Master is the Saving Grace, the Protector of His humble servants; those who have turned their backs on the Guru are overtaken by death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਹਾਂ ਦੁਖੁ ਆਗੈ ਨਰਕੁ ਭੁੰਚੈ ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਰਮਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eehaan dukh aagai narak bhunchai bahu jonee bharamaavai |1|
lines.english: He suffers in pain here, and falls into hell hereafter. He wanders in endless reincarnations. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਸ ਕਾ ਕਹਿਆ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸੁਣਈ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਬੈਸਣੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aus kaa kahiaa koe na sunee kahee na baisan paavai |
lines.english: No one listens to what he says; he is not allowed to sit anywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਰਤੇ ਕੀ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥੨॥੮੩॥੧੦੬॥
lines.translit: naanak saran nirbhau karate kee anad mangal gun gaaeaa |2|83|106|
lines.english: Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of the Fearless Creator Lord; he sings His Glorious Praises in ecstasy and bliss. ||2||83||106||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਭਇਆ ਖੰਡੀ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡੀ ਕੀਤਾ ਅਪਣਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: pragatt bheaa khanddee brahamanddee keetaa apanaa paaeaa |
lines.english: He has become infamous across worlds and galaxies; he receives according to what he has done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਚਲਤ ਬਹੁ ਪਰਕਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: trisanaa chalat bahu parakaar |
lines.english: Desire plays itself out in so many ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:
